structured_data.purchase_purpose: To enhance the efficiency and reproducibility of flow cytometry experiments by introducing an automated plate loader module that enables precise sample loading and washing, thereby improving overall w
structured_data.description: The installation of this module will significantly increase throughput and reduce manual handling errors in high-content flow cytometry analyses. It will support large-scale experimental screening and enable more consistent and reliable acquisition of quantitative cellular data, contributing to improved research productivity and data quality.
